# Conn Montgomery

First mentioned: **3310-01-22**  
Last mentioned: **3310-12-02**  
Total mentions: **3**

## Related


## Biography

Conn Montgomery served as Federal Defence Secretary during one of the most turbulent years in recent history, when the Thargoid invasion reached its devastating climax. In early 3310, he found himself managing massive refugee operations as Federal systems fell to alien assault, coordinating the evacuation of billions of civilians while military forces struggled to hold defensive lines.

The political environment made his job nearly impossible. ICE-casters and hawkish commentators blamed Seo Jin-ae — the former Far God cultist who had provided crucial intelligence on Thargoid behaviour — for revealing Earth's location to the aliens, transforming a complex strategic situation into a personal witch hunt. Montgomery's public statements attempted to maintain focus on logistical realities while the political discourse deteriorated into conspiracy theories. His tenure illustrated how even competent administrators could be overwhelmed when institutional collapse combined with populist rage.
